svg.title: Fraud Detection Data Flow — raw CSV to gold analytics
svg.desc: Step-by-step data flow showing how a transaction moves from raw IEEE-CIS CSV through bronze, Kafka, four Spark jobs, silver Iceberg, Airflow DAGs, and gold analytics tables.
svg.text: TRANSACTION DATA FLOW · IEEE-CIS → Gold Analytics

g.text: 994,376 messages · Avro schema from Apicurio · 12 partitions
schema enforcement · null checks · type casting
PostgreSQL join · card type · device category
merchant risk tier · derived feature engineering
uid_risk_profile (37,531 rows) — Trino queries · Superset · Grafana · Sovereign UI
